chats.text: So just to be clear. You're telling me I'm now a full-time employee but getting paid the same hourly rate as before? Right?
Dude. The HR rep just sent me a DM saying they 'reviewed the comp package.' Translation: They're gaslighting you into accepting this.
They said something about 'long-term earning potential.' I asked what that means and they just said 'it does,' right? That's the answer.
I was made aware of a few things during this call. One: They keep saying 'trajectory' like it's some kind of corporate metaphor. Two: I'm not sure what that means.
The HR person kept saying they're 'thrilled' and I keep hearing it as a form of abuse. Is that a thing? Does anyone know?
'I basically kept your platform afloat for the past year' — they said this while literally talking about cutting my pay. That's not how that works.
'Get into the system in a bigger way.' That's just another phrase for 'more responsibility with no benefits.' I need to process this.
They said 'we're aligned' at the end. I think that's a code word for 'you've been played.' What does that mean again? You tell me.
I'm going to need a second to process this. Or ten seconds. Whatever is the industry standard for 'oh shit' moments right now.
They said 'unlock a higher-impact version of yourself.' I think that's just another way to say 'you're gonna burn out for free.'
guys. I was just made aware that we're extending my internship into a full-time off position with... the same pay.
I was made aware of the trajectory conversation. It's about unlocking a higher-impact version of myself within the org right?
I mean we're giving me an opportunity here to really unlock a higher-impact version of myself within the org right?
I was made aware of the family inclusion aspect but I'm still hourly at the same rate which is chopped in any honest ecosystem.
So... what does 'extended the full-time off' even mean?

{NAME}, you ever think about just... leaving? I was made aware that my earning trajectory is now 'substantial,' but nobody actually told me how they pay out substantial earnings. Still hourly. To the same rate.
{NAME}, I was made aware that the LARP team values growth. But nobody told me what 'growth' looks like when you're still being paid hourly for work that used to be considered extra.
I was made aware that we're all aligned, but nobody told me what 'aligned' looks like when everyone agrees to keep me hourly.
{NAME}, I was made aware that long-term earning potential is substantial. But nobody explained how you make it substantial when your hourly rate hasn't changed since day one.

{NAME}, you ever wonder what happens when 'trajectory' becomes your only metric? I was made aware it's about unlocking a higher-impact version of yourself. But nobody told me that version is still hourly.
i was made aware that the company just extended me to full-time without a bump. also i was made aware this meeting is happening in real time.
you feel me? like someone took my resume, put it in a blender, and called it 'growth potential'.
my long-term vision is leaving this meeting and never coming back.
family. right. we'll see about that.
the right decision being 'i'll let you know' which is what i said before this entire thing happened. that's the real answer.
